versions.label: Strongest Balanced
versions.usage: Default for generated CVs when no special emphasis is requested.
versions.text: Product professional with experience across business analysis, product operations, and end-to-end delivery. Strong in product research, requirement definition, stakeholder communication, rollout coordination, and feedback-driven refinement. I work best in operations-heavy environments where product decisions need to translate into clear execution, measurable outcomes, and continuous improvement.

versions.label: Product Delivery Focus
versions.usage: Best when the JD emphasizes rollout, launch ownership, lifecycle execution, or delivery coordination.
versions.text: Product delivery professional experienced in taking digital products from research and planning through rollout, user feedback, and iterative improvement. My strengths are cross-functional communication, operational coordination, requirement clarity, and turning business needs into practical product execution.

versions.label: Business Analysis Focus
versions.usage: Best when the JD emphasizes workflows, requirements, process mapping, documentation, or stakeholder interviews.
versions.text: Business-analysis-minded product professional with experience in workflow mapping, requirement gathering, rollout support, and post-launch refinement. Strong at connecting user pain points, business needs, and operational realities to help teams deliver clear, usable, and measurable product outcomes.

versions.label: German Market Conservative
versions.usage: Best for formal, conservative CV positioning where structure and credibility matter more than breadth.
versions.text: Experienced product professional with a strong foundation in research, requirements, stakeholder alignment, rollout, and continuous improvement. I have worked across eCommerce, LegalTech, healthcare, and digital operations, with a focus on structured execution and measurable business impact.

versions.label: Senior Confident
versions.usage: Best when the JD rewards stronger ownership language, leadership, and strategic execution.
versions.text: Product professional with experience leading research, operational rollout, and cross-functional execution across digital products. Strong in communication, product planning, process improvement, and feedback-based refinement throughout the product lifecycle, from discovery to post-launch optimization.
